creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Anton (submitter) sent an email response to GNATS:

"After marcel@ dropped ia64, I want to spend
only the minimum of my time on ia64 ports.
So I'm no longer interested in this failure.
Perhaps you want to close this PR with WONTFIX?"

I don't have "WONTFIX", so I'll leave this as "In Discussion" for now.
